title: Close production remote-orphan governance gap
goal: Use source-backed evidence to close the remaining production remote-orphan governance gap, or explicitly reclassify any part as an external blocker with proof.
forbidden_scope: No provider adapter behavior changes unless a focused remote-orphan test proves it is required.
No schema migration unless current code/tests prove the gap cannot be closed without it.
No unrelated stale recovery or queue-worker refactor.
acceptance: A source graph identifies current remote-orphan summary/blocker/cleanup behavior and exact production governance gap.
The gap is closed with focused code/tests or explicitly reclassified as an external blocker with concrete evidence.
Focused stale remote cleanup/supervisor/server-executor tests pass.
API type-check/build and hygiene checks pass for touched files.
Docs and board sync are completed.
verification_commands: API type-check and build if API source changes.
Prettier, JSON/event parsing, diff hygiene, and production line-count checks.
review_gate: Production remote-orphan governance review: cleanup default-off safety, auditability, stale-session evidence, and operator-visible blockers.
